ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "film_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "film_title" TEXT /* Title of the film */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the film was released */,
  "genre" INTEGER /* Genre of the film */,
  "production_company" INTEGER /* Company that produced the film */,
  "director" INTEGER /* Director of the film */,
  "cast" TEXT /* Main cast of the film */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Duration of the film in minutes */,
  "budget" REAL /* Production budget of the film */,
  "boxoffice_collection" REAL /* Total box office collection of the film */,
  "ratings" REAL /* Average rating of the film (e.g., IMDb rating) */,
  "marketing_cost" REAL /* Cost of marketing and promotion */,
  "distributor" TEXT /* Name of the distributor */,
  "trailer_views" INTEGER /* Number of views on the film's trailer */,
  "social_media_hype" INTEGER /* Score based on social media mentions and engagement */,
  "release_weekend_earnings" REAL /* Earnings during the first weekend of release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_genre FOREIGN KEY ("genre") REFERENCES film_genres ("genre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_cast FOREIGN KEY ("cast") REFERENCES casts ("cast_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_director FOREIGN KEY ("director") REFERENCES directors ("director_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_films_production_company FOREIGN KEY ("production_company") REFERENCES production_companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theaters" (
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theater */,
  "theater_name" TEXT /* Name of the theater */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the theater */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the theater (number of seats) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the theater */,
  "opening_year" INTEGER /* Year the theater was opened */,
  "last_renovation_year" INTEGER /* Year the theater was last renovated */,
  "amenities" TEXT /* List of amenities (e.g., 3D projection, IMAX, VIP seating) */,
  "ticket_price_range" TEXT /* Range of ticket prices (e.g., $10 - $15) */,
  "average_customer_rating" REAL /* Average customer rating of the theater */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the theater */,
  "operational_hours" TEXT /* Opening and closing hours of the theater */,
  "capacity_usage" REAL /* Average capacity usage percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "daily_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "theater_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theater */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the performance */,
  "day_of_week" TEXT /* Day of the week (e.g., Monday, Tuesday) */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the film on the performance date */,
  "daily_earnings" REAL /* Daily box office earnings for the film in the theater */,
  "percent_change_yesterday" TEXT /* Percent change in earnings compared to the previous day */,
  "percent_change_last_week" TEXT /* Percent change in earnings compared to the same day of the previous week */,
  "theaters_showing" INTEGER /* Number of theaters showing the film */,
  "average_earnings" REAL /* Average earnings per theater */,
  "total_earnings_to_date" REAL /* Total earnings to date for the film */,
  "day_of_release" INTEGER /* Day of the release (e.g., 1 for the first day, 2 for the second day) */,
  "estimated" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the earnings are estimated */,
  "showtimes" INTEGER /* Number of showtimes for the film in the theater */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees for the performance */,
  "average_ticket_price" REAL /* Average price of a ticket for the performance */,
  "seats_sold" INTEGER /* Number of seats sold for the performance */,
  "seats_available" INTEGER /* Number of seats available for the performance */,
  "occupancy_rate" REAL /* Occupancy rate of the theater for the performance */,
  "marketing_spend" REAL /* Marketing spend for the film on the performance date */,
  "promotions" TEXT /* List of promotions or discounts offered on the performance date */,
  "customer_satisfaction" REAL /* Average customer satisfaction score for the performance */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions on the performance date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_performance_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_performance_theater_id FOREIGN KEY ("theater_id") REFERENCES theaters ("theater_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  "popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the genre */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of films in this genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "production_companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each production company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the production company */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the production company was founded */,
  "annual_revenue" REAL /* Annual revenue of the production company */,
  "average_boxoffice_success" REAL /* Average box office success of films produced by the company */,
  "number_of_films_produced" INTEGER /* Total number of films produced by the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Name of the director */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the director */,
  "number_of_films_directed" INTEGER /* Total number of films directed by the director */,
  "average_boxoffice_success" REAL /* Average box office success of films directed by the director */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of films directed by the director */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the film industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "casts" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the cast member */,
  "number_of_films_participated" INTEGER /* Total number of films the cast member has participated in */,
  "average_boxoffice_success" REAL /* Average box office success of films the cast member has participated in */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating of films the cast member has participated in */,
  "years_of_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the film industry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., marketing, operations, finance) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* User permissions (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "last_activity" TEXT /* Date of the last activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the browser or device used to access the data */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES daily_performance ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "film_id" INTEGER /* ID of the film */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., audience score, critic score) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date the metric was recorded */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the metric (e.g., Rotten Tomatoes, IMDb) */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric (e.g., audience score, critic score) */,
  "metric_scale" TEXT /* Scale of the metric (e.g., 0-100, 1-10) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("film_id")
)
